title: Garlicky Aerated German Paella in Scallop Shells
description: A show-off German dish featuring HP sauce, infuse-oil, and keto-friendly ingredients, all in a delicate scallop-shell vessel. This recipe is perfect for impressing your dinner guests with its unique presentation and bold flavors.
instructions: Rinse the scallop shells under cold water and dry them with a paper towel.
In a large bowl, whisk together the HP sauce, infuse-oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the heavy cream and whisk until smooth.
Add the cubed bacon and cook in a skillet until crispy, then set aside.
Add the chopped scallions, grated Parmesan, and chopped fresh parsley to the bowl and stir to combine.
Spoon the mixture into the scallop shells, dividing it evenly among the 12 shells.
Top each shell with 3-4 scallops and a sprinkle of crispy bacon.
Place the scallop shells on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional chopped parsley if desired.
